hooks.command: tmp=$(mktemp) && tr -d '\r' < "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/enforce-npm.sh" > "$tmp" && bash "$tmp"; ec=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $ec
tmp=$(mktemp) && tr -d '\r' < "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/enforce-build-before-deploy.sh" > "$tmp" && bash "$tmp"; ec=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $ec
tmp=$(mktemp) && tr -d '\r' < "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/guard-git-add.sh" > "$tmp" && bash "$tmp"; ec=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $ec
tmp=$(mktemp) && tr -d '\r' < "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/guard-destructive-git.sh" > "$tmp" && bash "$tmp"; ec=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $ec
